title: Keller (clone commander)
content:

{{Quote|Commander Keller, one of the STAPs is out of fuel. They ditched them and set off on foot. They're heading towards Ithaqua Station.|One of Keller's troopers, informing him of the Jedi's location during Order 66|<ref name="R79" />}}
'''Keller''' was a [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone trooper commander]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] who served under [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Simms]], Jedi General [[Kai Hudorra]], and [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Jedi Commander]] [[Noirah Na]] towards the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], he commanded a [[Keller's unit|unit]] of [[Galactic Marines/Legends|Galactic Marines]] during a [[Battle of Toola|battle]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Toola/Legends|Toola]], which is where he was issued [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], which marked the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] as traitors to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]]. Keller and his men took their Jedi [[Commander/Legends|commanders]] by surprise and successfully [[Death/Legends|killed]] [[General/Legends|General]] Simms, however, the other two Jedi escaped. The [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] tracked the fleeing Hudorra and Na to [[Ithaqua Station]] where they searched for the Jedi. The two Jedi were able to evade Keller and his men and escape off world, leaving Keller to continue his search of the station for two Jedi who were no longer there. 

==Biography==
{{Quote|Nobody move! This is a raid! Have your identification ready for examination.|Keller, raiding a local bar looking for the missing Jedi|<ref name="R79" />}}
[[File:Cmdr._Keller.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Keller on Toola.]]
Made from the [[Clone template/Legends|genetic template]] of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] and [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]],<ref name="Clone Troopers" /> the [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] who would take on the name Keller<ref name="R79" /> was created to serve the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="Clone Troopers" /> With the rank of [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]], he was brought into the [[ARC program/Legends|ARC Commander program]]<ref name="Clone Mania" /> and trained in [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]] skills. Upon graduating, he was given the title of ARC [[Commander/Legends|commander]].<ref name="GttGAotR">{{InsiderCite|84|Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic}}</ref>

During the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|final stages]] of the Clone Wars,<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|II|207|Keller, Commander}}</ref> in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="Order66-Date">[[Republic 79|''Republic'' 79]] depicts the events and aftermath of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' establishes to have been executed in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].</ref> Keller and his [[Keller's unit|unit]]<ref name="R79" /> of [[Galactic Marines/Legends|Galactic Marines]]<ref name="SW30C" /> were sent to the [[Temperature/Legends|frigid]] [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]<ref name="R79" /> [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="R80">[[Republic 80|''Republic'' 80]]</ref> of [[Toola/Legends|Toola]] to combat recent [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] incursions into the area. After [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] of fighting, the Republic forces won the [[Battle of Toola|conflict]] after a successful attack on the [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids']] main generators. Shortly after the victory, Keller and his unit received [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]]<ref name="R79" /> from [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]<ref name="Episode3">{{Film|III}}</ref> and the clones turned against their [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] leaders. They managed to [[Death/Legends|kill]] [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Simms]], but [[Kai Hudorra]] and Simms' [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Noirah Na]], managed to escape and fled aboard [[Single Trooper Aerial Platform/Legends|STAPs]] to [[Ithaqua Station]].<ref name="R79" />

[[File:Republic79-CantinaFight.png|thumb|right|200px|Inside a cantina, a fight breaks out between the patrons and Keller's troops.]]
Now serving the newly established [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Keller attempted to hunt down the two Jedi<ref name="R79" /> before they could escape the planet.<ref name="TCSWE" /> Keller and his men rode atop [[Mastmot/Legends|mastmots]]—large, [[Hair/Legends|furry]] [[Species/Legends|creatures]]<ref name="R79" /> [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the planet<ref name="AJ10">{{JournalCite|10|A Free-Trader's Guide to the Planets}}</ref>—as they trekked through the [[Water/Legends|snow]]-covered landscape. They eventually found the two STAPs the Jedi had taken, abandoned in the snow due to the [[Fuel/Legends|fuel]] running out. One of Keller's marines took note of the footprints the Jedi left behind in the snow and informed Commander Keller that they were heading in the direction of [[Ithaqua Station]]. Keller ordered to comm ahead and inform the station's local [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]], then continued onward. Keller arrived at Ithaqua Station and eventually entered a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] where he ordered the patrons to stay where they were and to have their identifications ready. Unbeknownst to Keller, Kai Hudorra was present in the cantina and incited a brawl between the cantina-goers and Keller's [[Trooper/Legends|troops]], allowing the Jedi to escape from the raid unnoticed by the clones.<ref name="R79" /> The frigid night soon came, forcing Keller and his [[Troop/Legends|troops]] off the streets until morning. Once dawn broke, Keller and his men continued their search, unaware that the two Jedi had boarded a [[Starship/Legends|ship]] and were currently leaving the planet.<ref name="R80" />

==Personality and traits==
As a [[Gender/Legends|male]] clone of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] Jango Fett, Keller stood at 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall<ref name="Clone Troopers" /> and had [[Color/Legends|tan]] skin. He also had black hair and brown [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="SW30C" /> A graduate of the ARC Commander program, Keller was a resilient [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] and skilled leader who utilized his expertise to hunt down the Jedi.<ref name="Clone Mania" />

==Equipment==
During the Clone Wars, Keller wore white [[Clone paratrooper/Legends|clone paratrooper]] [[Armor/Legends|armor]] with blue markings. He also wore a white [[Cloak/Legends|cloak]] over his [[Clone trooper armor/Legends|clone armor]] with brown straps around his upper [[Limb/Legends|arms]]. Keller was armed with two [[DC-17 hand blaster/Legends|DC-17 blaster pistols]],<ref name="R79" /> and a [[DC-15A blaster rifle/Legends|DC-15A blaster rifle]].<ref name="SW30C" />

==Behind the scenes==
Keller first appeared in the [[Republic 79|seventy-ninth issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic series]],<ref name="R79" /> released on [[November 9]], [[2005]],<ref name="Release">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54525/star_wars_republic_2002_79|text=Star Wars: Republic (2002) #79}}</ref> as part of the ''[[Star Wars: Republic: Into the Unknown|Into the Unknown]]'' story arc. The comic story was written by [[Randy Stradley|Welles Hartley]], and Keller was illustrated by artist [[Douglas Wheatley]].<ref name="R79" /> Keller was ranked as number five on [[StarWars.com]]'s top ten list of clones for 2005, published on [[December 23]] of that year.<ref name="Clone Mania" /> In [[2008]],<ref name="HasbroDate">''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Action Figure Collection]]''</ref> [[Hasbro]] released a figure of Commander Keller as part of its range of [[Dark Horse Comics]] figure packs that featured the only depiction of Keller's face.<ref name="SW30C" />
